title: Sovv Stateroom
content:
{{Top|leg}}
The '''Sovv Stateroom''' was the stateroom on the [[Anakin Solo (starship)|''Anakin Solo'']] that visiting dignitaries stayed in. It was located on the [[Commander's Deck]].

==Appearances==
*''[[Legacy of the Force: Tempest]]''
